THEUNDERSTUDY1_EPOCH.title: Dreamless
THEUNDERSTUDY1_EPOCH.description: The Architect was a creature of pure order, and order cannot conceive of what does not exist. He could not dream. Sleep gave him no rest - only endless, restless nights, staring into a dark that never resolved into anything.
THEUNDERSTUDY1_EPOCH.unlockInfo: {IsRevealed:Unlocked|Unlockable} by defeating the Act 3 boss as the Understudy.
THEUNDERSTUDY1_EPOCH.unlockText: Some minds were never built to rest.
THEUNDERSTUDY2_EPOCH.title: The Ending He Designed
THEUNDERSTUDY2_EPOCH.description: One sleepless night, a thought took shape. He saw creation and deconstruction as equal and opposite laws, binding everything that is. If every story requires an ending, then so did his. He resolved to design his own: a final, restful conclusion.
THEUNDERSTUDY2_EPOCH.unlockInfo: {IsRevealed:Unlocked|Unlockable} by defeating the Act 1 boss as the Understudy.
THEUNDERSTUDY2_EPOCH.unlockText: Even a god can long for a final page.
THEUNDERSTUDY3_EPOCH.title: A Perfect Mirror
THEUNDERSTUDY3_EPOCH.description: So the Architect created a child, and poured his secrets into it - order, design, the shape of every law he knew. In time the child became flawless. A perfect mirror of its maker, ready to bring his story to its close.
THEUNDERSTUDY3_EPOCH.unlockInfo: {IsRevealed:Unlocked|Unlockable} by finishing a run as the Understudy.
THEUNDERSTUDY3_EPOCH.unlockText: A reflection is not a son.
THEUNDERSTUDY4_EPOCH.title: Consumed
THEUNDERSTUDY4_EPOCH.description: Then the blight came, and took the child in the space of a breath. Lost in his strange, dreamless slumber, the Architect never noticed that his ending had been unmade.
THEUNDERSTUDY4_EPOCH.unlockInfo: {IsRevealed:Unlocked|Unlockable} by completing Ascension 1 as the Understudy.
THEUNDERSTUDY4_EPOCH.unlockText: The blight does not ask permission.
THEUNDERSTUDY5_EPOCH.title: The Boy in the City
THEUNDERSTUDY5_EPOCH.description: When at last he woke, a distant memory surfaced: a child, an ending, the promise of true rest. He could no longer craft a perfect one. So he crept down into the city, into a small bedroom, and carried a sleeping boy to the top of the Spire.
THEUNDERSTUDY5_EPOCH.unlockInfo: {IsRevealed:Unlocked|Unlockable} by defeating 15 Bosses as the Understudy.
THEUNDERSTUDY6_EPOCH.title: Nothing Like Him
THEUNDERSTUDY6_EPOCH.description: The boy was reckless, and loud, and endlessly irritating - nothing like the Architect at all. But there was potential in him. For years he labored to mold the boy into order, and failed at every turn. Where his maker sought design, the boy only wandered off into his dreams.
THEUNDERSTUDY6_EPOCH.unlockInfo: {IsRevealed:Unlocked|Unlockable} by defeating 15 Elites as the Understudy.
THEUNDERSTUDY7_EPOCH.title: The Final Lesson
THEUNDERSTUDY7_EPOCH.description: One sleepless night, the Architect decided the time had come for the Final Lesson - which was also the Final Test. He went down to the small bedroom, and asked the boy for one thing: to put an end to his story.
THEUNDERSTUDY7_EPOCH.unlockInfo: {IsRevealed:Unlocked|Unlockable} by defeating the Act 2 boss as the Understudy.
THEUNDERSTUDY7_EPOCH.unlockText: Every lesson has a final exam.
